The same is true for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance. --- (Back): jan lawa Osopa pi lukin suli

card.name: Paradox Investigations
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, look at the top card of your library. You may put a creature card from the top of your library or your graveyard onto the battlefield, then exile that card. {4}{U}{B}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Put a creature card exiled with this enchantment onto the battlefield under your control. Put the rest into their owner's graveyards.

card.name: Paragon of the Herd
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 2/2 green Capybara creature token. Creature tokens you control get +1/+1 and have vigilance and haste.

card.name: Radiant Pyromancer
card.text: Opus (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may set this card's opus to that spell's mana value.) Whenever you attack, create a tapped and attacking X/1 red Elemental creature token, where X is Radiant Pyromancer's opus. At the beginning of the next end step, sacrifice the token.

card.name: Rakhamezhi, the Ambiguous
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, copy it. You may cast the copy if it would have different characteristics than the card you cast. The copy costs {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} less to cast.

card.name: Reckoning of Worlds
card.text: Starting with you, each player chooses a nonland permanent they control and puts it in a "Celestial" pile, a "Terrestrial" pile or an "Infernal" pile. Repeat this process until all nonland permanents are in a pile. Destroy one or two of those piles of your choice.

card.name: Robot Herding
card.text: When Robot Herding enters, create two 1/1 blue and red Robot artifact creature tokens. They gain haste until end of turn and attack this combat if able. Whenever one or more artifact creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Sacred Assassin
card.text: Haunt (When this creature dies, exile it haunting target creature.) Lifelink, deathtouch When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white and black Spirit creature token with flying. When the creature this card haunts dies, return this card to your hand.

card.name: Sanity is the Price of Knowledge
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has flying and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, each player draws a card and each opponent loses life equal to the number of cards in their hand." Séance {4}{U}{B} ({4}{U}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a token copy of it, except it's a Spirit creature that says "this" instead of "enchanted." Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Scrap Recycler
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, you may sacrifice a nonland permanent other than that creature. If you do, put two +1/+1 counters on that creature. Memorial {4}{B}{G} ({4}{B}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a token copy of it, except it's an artifact with no power, toughness, or mana cost.)

card.name: Stagserpent
card.text: Deathtouch, haste Whenever this creature attacks, create a 0/1 black, red, and green Horror creature token named Stagserpent's Tail.

card.name: Svetlana, Gate Guardian
card.text: Hexproof from monocolored Gate cards you own can go on a Sworn Companions Adventure if they could produce white mana. The same is true of Divination and blue, Mind Rot and black, Act of Treason and red, and Confidence from Strength and green. (They're all {2}? sorceries. Create two 1/1 white Soldiers with lifelink; Draw two cards; Target player discards two cards; Control target creature this turn, untap it and give it haste this turn; or Target creature gets +4/+4 and gains trample until end of turn.)

card.name: Targeted Demolition
card.text: For each player, each of their opponents chooses a nonland card type. That player reveals their hand, then discards all cards in their hand of that type and sacrifices each permanent they control of that type.

card.name: Transcended One of Betrayal
card.text: Whenever Transcended One of Betrayal enters or attacks, create a 2/2 black Saurian Zombie creature token. Whenever another creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you may exchange control of that creature and target nonland permanent that player controls with mana value less than that damage.

card.name: Warden of the Sword
card.text: During your turn, Warden of the Sword and other modified creatures you control have first strike. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.) Whenever Warden of the Sword attacks, if its power is 8 or greater, you choose how target creature blocks this turn.

card.name: Your Deaths Were Long Foretold
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever another Aura you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on enchanted creature and draw a card. card.name: Inter // Ruption
card.text:
Counter up to one target spell and destroy up to one target permanent.
---
Put up to one permanent card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You may cast a spell from a graveyard without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Force of Coercion
card.text: You may pay 1 life and exile a blue or black card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Target opponent mills seven cards. Then you may cast an instant card or a card with flash from among them without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Force of Habit
card.text: You may pay 1 life and exile a red or blue card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Copy target instant or sorcery spell. You choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Force of Impact
card.text: You may pay 1 life and exile a black or red card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. If a creature you control would deal combat damage to a permanent or player this turn, it deals twice that much damage to that permanent or player instead.

card.name: Force of Infection
card.text: You may pay 1 life and exile a black or green card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Creatures you control gain deathtouch and "When this creature dies, return it from your graveyard to your hand" until end of turn.

card.name: Force of Instinct
card.text: You may pay 1 life and exile a green or white card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Creatures you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Like Clockwork
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, return target creature card with lesser mana value than that spell from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Revocable Relinquishment
card.text: Note the name of target creature you control, then exchange that creature with target creature card in your graveyard with the same mana value and note that card's name. Create a colorless artifact token named Temporal Anomaly with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exchange a creature you control with the second noted name and a creature card in your graveyard with the first noted name."

card.name: Yuki
card.text: Sabotage — Whenever an opponent or permanent an opponent controls becomes the target of a spell you control, put a +1/+1 counter on Yuki. {G}: Yuki gains trample until end of turn. {1}{U}, Remove two counters from Yuki: Tap target creature and put two stun counters on it.

card.name: Ground Control Tower
card.text: When this Fortification enters, create a 3/3 Vehicle artifact creature token with flying and crew 2 named Fighter Jet. Fortified land can crew vehicles as though it were a creature with power 2. Fortify {2} ({2}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Lithoform Core
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a charge counter on Lithoform Core. {T}, Remove two counters from Lithoform Core: Destroy target nonbasic land. Its controller creates a Wastes token. (It's a basic land with "{T}: Add {C}.") {T}, Remove five counters from Lithoform Core: Destroy target permanent.

card.name: Overseer Hangar
card.text: If you would create one or more non-Drone tokens, instead create those tokens plus that many 1/1 colorless Drone artifact creature tokens with flying. {2}, {T}, Discard a card: Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Prosperous Compass
card.text: Draft Prosperous Compass face up. As long as Prosperous Compass is face up during the draft, each player drafts two cards from each booster pack. At the end of the draft round, turn Prosperous Compass face down. {T}: Add two mana of any color.

card.name: Sheltering Wreckage
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {X}: Put X charge counters on Sheltering Wreckage. As long as Sheltering Wreckage has ten or more charge counters on it, it's an artifact creature with flying.
